title: Sanofi India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Sanofi India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
